name: sort_can
description: Pick up the can and place it on the plate of the given color.

target_color.description: Which colored plate to place the can on.

name: pour_water
description: Pour the water from the source container into the target container.

name: pick
description: Pick up (grasp and lift) the named object.

object.description: The object to pick up, e.g. 'can', 'cup', 'block'.

name: place
description: Place the currently held object onto the named target location.

target.description: Where to place the held object, e.g. 'orange plate', 'tray', 'shelf'.

name: home
description: Return the arm to its neutral home / rest pose.
